opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I woke up choking with a terrible burning pressure in my chest, and I am terrified I'm having a heart attack.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It hit me a couple of hours after I fell asleep and it woke me right up. It's the middle of the night and I don't know if I should be calling an ambulance.

symptom_narrative.onset: woke me up about two hours after I fell asleep, roughly an hour ago
symptom_narrative.duration: on and off for the last hour
symptom_narrative.character: a hot, burning pressure right behind my breastbone, and a horrible sour taste coming up into my mouth and throat
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really severe — it frightened me badly and I'm too scared to lie back down
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: middle of my chest, behind the breastbone, and up into my throat
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worse the moment I lie flat or bend over; came on in the night
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting up helps a bit, and the antacid I keep swigging takes the edge off for a while
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying flat, bending over, and it came on after a big late dinner with wine
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: sour acid keeps coming back up into my mouth, sometimes a sudden rush of salty watery spit, a dry night-time cough, and I keep having to clear my throat in the mornings
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get heartburn now and then after big meals but never anything like this in the middle of the night
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can't get back to sleep, pacing around the flat, too anxious and scared to lie down

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: I've drunk about half a bottle tonight already

social_history_volunteered.alcohol: had wine with dinner tonight; drinks socially
social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: had a big, late, heavy pizza dinner tonight
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; got frightened being on his own in the night

objective_data_offered.value: I keep burping and clearing my throat, and I can taste sour acid coming back up
I'm too scared to lie down — every time I lie flat the burning gets worse, so I'm sitting up and pacing
empty pizza boxes and wine glasses still on the living-room table from tonight's dinner
